productDisplayName: Nike Women Nike Pink-Blue tote Pink Bags
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this hot pink tote from nike will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go shopping, for a movie, or to college. It's large enough to accomodate all your essentials and neat enough to get you loads of attention from strangers! Measurement Height: 40 cm Width: 36 cm Depth: 13 cm Capacity: 20 litres Made of polyester for enhanced durability and style Nylon lining for increased durability One main roomy zippered compartment with a small zippered pocket to hold essentials Graphic print on the front with nike Swoosh for added attraction short comfortable handles for ease of carrying Detachable mobile pouch on handle Small loop at the back for hanging from a hook for storage purpose Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Brand logo appliqued at the back Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
